title: Set up React Testing Library
summary: Install @testing-library/react with Vitest (or Jest), write render/screen/userEvent component tests, and enforce accessibility with jest-axe.
declaration: I will set up React Testing Library for component testing. This works alongside Vitest (preferred) or Jest. I will configure jsdom, write example tests using screen queries and userEvent, and add accessibility checks with jest-axe. If you need pure unit tests without a DOM, Vitest alone is sufficient.
